name: Verizon Communications Inc.
description: Verizon Communications Inc. is a leading global telecommunications holding company that provides a wide range of communications, information, and entertainment products and services. Headquartered in New York City, the company operates one of the most advanced wireless networks in the United States and offers high-speed internet, television, and voice services to millions of consumers, businesses, and government agencies. Through its extensive infrastructure and commitment to technological innovation, Verizon plays a critical role in connecting people and businesses across the globe while continuously expanding its capabilities in 5G technology and digital solutions.
